economic_notes: GBEs: Kasabonika SGR GP Inc. and Kasabonika SGR Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Consolidated subsidiaries include Petrokas Ltd., Kasabonika Community Development Corporation, Wechimachida Construction Services (GP) Corporation, and Wechimachida Construction Limited Partnership. Portfolio investments in multiple limited partnerships including Landmark Inn, Happy Time Real Estate Holdings LP, FN Motel One LP. Owns 32,159 shares in Exchange Income Corporation.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to confirm completeness of Asset Retirement Obligations (PS 3280). Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' in Winnipeg, Manitoba — firm name not identified in text provided. GBEs reported on December 31, 2023 fiscal year (not March 31). Deferred revenue movement is very large — $38.1M deferred in prior year recognized in 2024, and $20.6M deferred to subsequent year, causing significant revenue volatility. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($37,138,965) + Ontario ($4,666,375) + CMHC ($486,729) + NAN ($330,390) = $42,622,459; OFNLP ($1,538,517) may be partially government-related. Net financial assets is negative (net debt position) of $6,065,831. Prior year comparative figures restated. Large increase in long-term debt from $11.4M to $16.6M and major capital asset purchases of $24.3M during year.
